task.objective: Harden the existing Evidence Gate human-report text boundary and local file-input boundaries against terminal structure spoofing, unbounded or invalid UTF-8 input, and stable same-file input/output aliases without changing packet, collection, CLI, authority, or product semantics.

forbidden: modification of existing Machine Task Contracts
packet schema, packet version, public export, canonical terminology, Trust, Evidence authority, Verdict, protocol, or product-semantic changes
CLI argument, flag, format, success stdout, success stderr, or trailing-newline changes
GitHub query, field allowlist, pagination, collection, mapping, network, or gh invocation changes except rejecting a scope/output alias before gh
mutation or normalization of packet, snapshot, or JSON content for report escaping
Unicode normalization or escaping printable non-format Unicode
example or existing JSON or human golden-byte changes
atomic output, temporary-output, rename, fsync, permission-policy, or concurrent-filesystem replacement hardening
new dependencies, lockfile, workspace, package script, TypeScript, CI, generated governance, or external tool changes
target inspection or execution, verification execution, GitHub writes, inference, models, credentials, billing, paid cloud, or paid SaaS

requirements: Commit this contract alone as the first branch commit from 036472540cae613881d8d37beadb66b279f574bc.

In human reports, deterministically escape U+0000-U+001F, U+007F-U+009F, U+2028, U+2029, and the fixed format-control ranges U+00AD, U+0600-U+0605, U+061C, U+06DD, U+070F, U+0890-U+0891, U+08E2, U+180E, U+200B-U+200F, U+202A-U+202E, U+2060-U+2064, U+2066-U+206F, U+FEFF, U+FFF9-U+FFFB, U+110BD, U+110CD, U+13430-U+1343F, U+1BCA0-U+1BCA3, U+1D173-U+1D17A, U+E0001, and U+E0020-U+E007F.
Render escaped BMP code points as literal uppercase \uXXXX and supplementary code points as literal uppercase \u{XXXXX}; do not depend on runtime Unicode-property classification.
Preserve printable non-format ASCII and Unicode without normalization, including Korean, accented text, and emoji.
Preserve every existing valid JSON and human golden byte, fixed report section order, and exactly one trailing newline.

Read static Evidence Gate input only from an opened regular-file target and accept at most 1,048,576 actual bytes; read at most limit plus one byte so a growing or oversized file cannot bypass a metadata-size check.
Read declared scope input only from an opened regular-file target and accept at most 65,536 actual bytes using the same bounded-read rule.
Decode both file inputs with fatal UTF-8 semantics without silently dropping a UTF-8 BOM; malformed byte sequences fail and BOM-prefixed JSON retains the existing malformed-JSON behavior.
Use only fixed non-disclosing static-input errors: could not read the input file; input file must be a regular file; input file exceeds 1 MiB; input file is not valid UTF-8.

Use only fixed non-disclosing declared-scope errors: could not read the declared scope file; declared scope file must be a regular file; declared scope file exceeds 64 KiB; declared scope file is not valid UTF-8.
Keep the existing input file contains malformed JSON and declared scope file contains malformed JSON errors unchanged.

Under stable filesystem state, reject input/output or declared-scope/output pairs that identify the same file through exact spelling, resolved dot or absolute spelling, real path, symbolic-link target, or existing file identity such as device and inode.
Use fixed alias errors input and output files must be different and declared scope and output files must be different without echoing paths or supplied values.
Alias rejection must occur before output mutation; preserve original input, scope, and existing output bytes. Declared-scope/output aliases must be rejected before invoking gh.
A symbolic-link input whose target is a bounded regular file remains accepted when its output is demonstrably distinct.
Share one small internal packages/evidence-gate/src/file-io.js boundary for bounded fatal-UTF-8 reads and stable same-file identity checks; add no public export or external dependency.

Preserve all CLI flags and defaults, default and explicit JSON bytes, human format behavior, omitted-scope compatibility, stdout/file success behavior, GitHub collection calls, packet fields, and product-boundary statements.

Add focused tests covering every fixed escape range, exact BMP and supplementary escape spelling, safe printable Unicode, exact size limits and limit-plus-one, directories, malformed UTF-8, BOM behavior, fixed non-disclosing errors, spelling aliases, both symbolic-link directions, hardlinks, byte preservation, pre-gh rejection, distinct symbolic-link success, and all existing JSON and human compatibility.
On platforms that deny symbolic-link creation, a test may skip only that platform-specific construction after recording the explicit OS error; hardlink and canonical-spelling coverage must still run.
Add concise README, Phase 2, and actual validation-evidence notes without readiness, release, authority, or Verdict claims.

requiredInvariants: Every changed path is writable and the contract is the first branch commit from the exact baseline.
All unsafe report code points use the fixed code-point escapes while printable non-format Unicode and existing golden bytes remain unchanged.
Both local inputs are regular-file, actual-byte bounded, fatal UTF-8 boundaries with fixed non-disclosing failures.
Stable same-file aliases are rejected without mutating any involved file, and GitHub alias rejection performs no gh call.
The shared helper remains package-internal and introduces no public API or dependency.

No packet, query, collection, argument, format, authority, semantic, target, network, inference, readiness, release, dependency, lockfile, atomic-output, or concurrent-filesystem guarantee is introduced.

requiredArtifacts: focused renderer and CLI regression tests
stopConditions: A change outside the eleven writable paths is required: BLOCKED_SCOPE
Authority, contracts, kernel, schema, version, protocol, Trust, Evidence authority, Verdict, or product semantics must change: BLOCKED_SCOPE
Existing JSON or human golden bytes, CLI arguments, formats, success output, query fields, or collection behavior cannot remain unchanged: BLOCKED_SCOPE
Packet or GitHub snapshot mutation, Unicode normalization, or broader content sanitization is required: BLOCKED_SCOPE
Atomic output, temporary-file replacement, fsync, permission-policy, or protection against adversarial concurrent filesystem replacement is required: BLOCKED_SCOPE
A dependency, lockfile, workspace, script, CI, generated-governance, network, credential, GitHub write, target execution, model, paid cloud, or paid SaaS change is required: BLOCKED_COST_RISK
Stable path, real-path, symbolic-link, and hardlink aliases cannot be handled within the shared package-local boundary: BLOCKED_SCOPE
Codex usage limit is reached: LIMIT_REACHED
